base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of subweapon_silver_knife — a projectile (melee_thrown) from 1987 castlevania ii simons quest. Silver Knife — mid-tier dagger. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Silver Knife — mid-tier dagger; extra damage vs werewolves
